about.title: About SportBook
about.intro: SportBook is a two-sided platform for booking sports venues (courts and fields). A venue publishes its availability and lets people book a specific hour without a phone call; the venue's staff sees who is coming and confirms it.
about.oneAccount: Every account can act as both a customer and a venue owner - registration always creates a plain account, and there is currently no separate "become a venue owner" step. Whether you use the customer-facing search/booking pages or the owner dashboard is simply a matter of which nav link you choose.
about.customer: Search venues by city and sport, see a court's free hourly slots for a given day, and book one. The price is always computed from the court's price per hour - the app never trusts a client-supplied price. A booking can be cancelled up until 2 hours before its start; inside that window cancellation is refused.
about.owner: List your own venues and courts (name, address, sport type, price per hour, opening/closing hours), see the bookings made against them, and confirm each pending booking. A venue or court cannot be deleted while it still has an upcoming, non-cancelled booking against it.
about.reviews: Any authenticated user can rate a venue (1-5 stars plus an optional comment): one review per user per venue - submitting again replaces your previous rating and comment rather than creating a duplicate, and the venue's average rating updates immediately.
about.mapDataIntro: The city directory used for search comes from
about.loginPrompt: Most of the app requires an account.
